description: The bundled script should update an existing PR for the current branch instead of creating a duplicate.
skill_rules_that_must_fire: If the current branch already has an open PR to `main`, the script updates title/body instead of creating a duplicate PR.
One-click: run gates, generate body, then create-or-update PR to main
Confirm PR points to `base=main` and `head=<feature branch>`.
